Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_EnableWor: Completely enables or disables the spawning of Zombie Virus Vaccine items in the world.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_ExpandChe: Expands the loot table to include additional chemical products.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_LootSyrin: Defines how many syringes from the mod appear in the world.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_LootEquip: Defines how many laboratory equipment books appear in the world.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_LootVirol: Defines how many virology and chemistry books appear in the world.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_VirologyB: Defines whether virology books spawn only in specific locations or are spread throughout the world.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_LootChemi: Defines how many chemical items from the mod appear in the world.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_BloodAgin: 14 is the default value from the original mod. If issues occur, reduce this value or disable blood aging.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_EnableLig: Enables or disables the spawning of the light painting magazine. If disabled, players will not be able to learn how to paint lights.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_AllowAuto: Allows players to perform autopsies directly on the ground, without the need for a table.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_AutopsySp: <BHC>Changing this option will affect game balance. <RGB:1,1,1><LINE> Defines how many ticks are required to complete an autopsy. Lower values = faster.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_TicksDecr: <BHC>Changing this option will affect game balance. <RGB:1,1,1><LINE> How many ticks are reduced from the autopsy time for each First Aid skill level.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_TableSpee: <BHC>Changing this option will affect game balance. <RGB:1,1,1><LINE> Defines the speed bonus when performing an autopsy on an autopsy table.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_AutopsyGr: <BHC>Changing this option will affect game balance. <RGB:1,1,1><LINE> Amount of experience gained when performing an autopsy on the ground.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_AutopsyTa: <BHC>Changing this option will affect game balance. <RGB:1,1,1><LINE> Amount of experience gained when performing an autopsy on a table.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_AllowScal: If enabled, scalpels will degrade and break with use.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_AllowSawD: If enabled, saws will degrade and break with use.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_EnableVeh: Enables or disables item spawning in vehicles.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_EnableBag: Enables or disables item spawning in survivor backpacks.
Sandbox_ZombieVirusVaccineBETA_DebugMode: <BHC>Do NOT change this. DEV ONLY. <RGB:1,1,1><LINE> Prints a hella lot of debug info in console.
